heading: Relevant definitions, including Amie Zyla expansion of sex offender definition and expanded inclusion of child predators
label: 20911 Relevant definitions, including Amie Zyla expansion of sex offender definition and expanded inclusion of child predators

children.heading: Sex offender
children.label: 1 Sex offender
children.text: The term “sex offender” means an individual who was convicted of a sex offense.

children.heading: Tier I sex offender
children.label: 2 Tier I sex offender
children.text: The term “tier I sex offender” means a sex offender other than a tier II or tier III sex offender.

children.label: i
children.text: sex trafficking (as described in );section 1591 of title 18

children.label: ii
children.text: coercion and enticement (as described in );section 2422(b) of title 18

children.label: iii
children.text: transportation with intent to engage in criminal sexual activity (as described in section 2423(a)) of title 18;1So in original. The second closing parenthesis probably should follow “18”.1

children.label: iv
children.text: abusive sexual contact (as described in );section 2244 of title 18

children.label: i
children.text: use of a minor in a sexual performance;

children.label: ii
children.text: solicitation of a minor to practice prostitution; or

children.label: iii
children.text: production or distribution of child pornography; or

children.label: C
children.text: occurs after the offender becomes a tier I sex offender.

children.label: i
children.text: aggravated sexual abuse or sexual abuse (as described in sections 2241 and 2242 of title 18); or

children.label: ii
children.text: abusive sexual contact (as described in ) against a minor who has not attained the age of 13 years;section 2244 of title 18

children.label: B
children.text: involves kidnapping of a minor (unless committed by a parent or guardian); or

children.label: C
children.text: occurs after the offender becomes a tier II sex offender.

children.heading: Amie Zyla expansion of sex offense definition
children.label: 5 Amie Zyla expansion of sex offense definition
i
children.text: a criminal offense that has an element involving a sexual act or sexual contact with another;

children.label: ii
children.text: a criminal offense that is a specified offense against a minor;

children.label: iii
children.text: a Federal offense (including an offense prosecuted under section 1152 or 1153 of title 18) under section 1591, or chapter 109A, 110 (other than section 2257, 2257A, or 2258), or 117, of title 18;

children.label: iv
children.text: a military offense specified by the Secretary of Defense under ( note); orsection 115(a)(8)(C)(i) of Public Law 105–11910 U.S.C. 951

children.label: v
children.text: an attempt or conspiracy to commit an offense described in clauses (i) through (iv).

children.heading: Foreign convictions
children.label: B Foreign convictions
children.text: A foreign conviction is not a sex offense for the purposes of this subchapter if it was not obtained with sufficient safeguards for fundamental fairness and due process for the accused under guidelines or regulations established under .section 20912 of this title

children.heading: Offenses involving consensual sexual conduct
children.label: C Offenses involving consensual sexual conduct
children.text: An offense involving consensual sexual conduct is not a sex offense for the purposes of this subchapter if the victim was an adult, unless the adult was under the custodial authority of the offender at the time of the offense, or if the victim was at least 13 years old and the offender was not more than 4 years older than the victim.

children.heading: Criminal offense
children.label: 6 Criminal offense
children.text: The term “criminal offense” means a State, local, tribal, foreign, or military offense (to the extent specified by the Secretary of Defense under ( note)) or other criminal offense.section 115(a)(8)(C)(i) of Public Law 105–11910 U.S.C. 951

children.heading: Expansion of definition of “specified offense against a minor” to include all offenses by child predators
children.label: 7 Expansion of definition of “specified offense against a minor” to include all offenses by child predators
A
children.text: An offense (unless committed by a parent or guardian) involving kidnapping.

children.label: B
children.text: An offense (unless committed by a parent or guardian) involving false imprisonment.

children.label: C
children.text: Solicitation to engage in sexual conduct.

children.label: D
children.text: Use in a sexual performance.

children.label: E
children.text: Solicitation to practice prostitution.

children.label: F
children.text: Video voyeurism as described in .section 1801 of title 18

children.label: G
children.text: Possession, production, or distribution of child pornography.

children.label: H
children.text: Criminal sexual conduct involving a minor, or the use of the Internet to facilitate or attempt such conduct.

children.label: I
children.text: Any conduct that by its nature is a sex offense against a minor.

children.heading: Convicted as including certain juvenile adjudications
children.label: 8 Convicted as including certain juvenile adjudications
children.text: The term “convicted” or a variant thereof, used with respect to a sex offense, includes adjudicated delinquent as a juvenile for that offense, but only if the offender is 14 years of age or older at the time of the offense and the offense adjudicated was comparable to or more severe than aggravated sexual abuse (as described in ), or was an attempt or conspiracy to commit such an offense.section 2241 of title 18

children.heading: Sex offender registry
children.label: 9 Sex offender registry
children.text: The term “sex offender registry” means a registry of sex offenders, and a notification program, maintained by a jurisdiction.

children.label: A
children.text: A State.

children.label: B
children.text: The District of Columbia.

children.label: C
children.text: The Commonwealth of Puerto Rico.

children.label: D
children.text: Guam.

children.label: E
children.text: American Samoa.

children.label: F
children.text: The Northern Mariana Islands.

children.label: G
children.text: The United States Virgin Islands.

children.label: H
children.text: To the extent provided and subject to the requirements of , a federally recognized Indian tribe.section 20929 of this title

children.heading: Student
children.label: 11 Student
children.text: The term “student” means an individual who enrolls in or attends an educational institution, including (whether public or private) a secondary school, trade or professional school, and institution of higher education.

children.heading: Employee
children.label: 12 Employee
children.text: The term “employee” includes an individual who is self-employed or works for any other entity, whether compensated or not.

children.heading: Resides
children.label: 13 Resides
children.text: The term “resides” means, with respect to an individual, the location of the individual’s home or other place where the individual habitually lives.

children.heading: Minor
children.label: 14 Minor
children.text: The term “minor” means an individual who has not attained the age of 18 years.
